name: @pm/agent-state-provenance
description: Quarantined operational-state provenance tower: witness ledgers, authority transitions, quorum certificates, epoch seals, pruning tombstones, settlement/finality proofs. No substrate runtime path may depend on this package (enforced by scripts/validate-budgets.ts). Opt-in SQL ledger: db/migrations-provenance/ behind PM_ENABLE_AGENT_STATE_PROVENANCE=1.
